author: mark
text: Fix shipped in plugin sibling repo /home/mark/dev/balls-github-plugin @ 5f4185a (merge of b67e51d). pull_emit no longer double-wraps SyncCreate.external; PROJECTION_PREFIX aligned to participant name 'github-issues'. Regression test in pull_tests.rs round-trips created_from through core's apply_created and asserts classify yields KnownUpdate/Skip, never AutoCreate. Existing duplicate tasks need a companion cleanup ball.
